contributor.authority_note: Fictional device identity; no publication authority claimed.

contribution.summary: A fictional demo logger recorded 12.4 degC during a five-minute sample window.

witness_receipts.public_safe_summary: Fictional temperature reading recorded and reviewed with limits. It can be displayed as a sample receipt but cannot verify watershed condition.

reviewer_witness.statement: Calibration and uncertainty are visible; public precision is generalized.

limitations: Not suitable for enforcement, eligibility, underwriting, or risk pricing.
Not evidence of real sensor deployment.

contributor.authority_note: Fictional observer identity; no authority to publish place-based knowledge claimed.

contribution.summary: A fictional observer wrote a qualitative public-sample note about visible conditions at a generalized training reach.

review_summary.claim_limit: qualitative note only; not species verification or trend evidence

witness_receipts.public_safe_summary: Fictional qualitative field note recorded with reduced location precision. It is review material only and is marked not-for-computation.

reviewer_witness.statement: Sensitive-location handling is active and public summary must remain coarse.

state_history.reason: Initial public-sample receipt with not-for-computation flag

limitations: Not compliance, enforcement, eligibility, underwriting, or risk-pricing evidence.
Exact location and raw note remain undisplayed.

contributor.authority_note: Fictional team identity; no real organizational authority claimed.

contribution.summary: A fictional maintenance team reported tightening one rain-gauge bracket and reseating two training plot markers.

review_summary.claim_limit: reported maintenance event; not proof of ecological outcome

witness_receipts.public_safe_summary: Fictional repair event recorded and reviewed with limits. It reports maintenance activity only, not restoration success.

reviewer_witness.statement: Receipt can show reported maintenance, with explicit no-outcome limit.

limitations: Not evidence of real maintenance work.
Not suitable for compliance, enforcement, eligibility, underwriting, or risk pricing.

acceptance_checks.criterion: Sensor readings and human observations can share one packet model.
Location precision can be reduced for sensitive places.
Public receipts do not expose protected locations or identities.
receipt_evidence: all receipts use fictional identities, generalized public locations, and no coordinates

acceptance_checks.criterion: Records can be withdrawn, corrected, or marked not-for-computation.

refusal_boundaries: Do not treat a raw sensor reading as a verified claim.
Do not publish sensitive ecological or cultural locations.
Do not infer compliance, enforcement, risk pricing, underwriting, or eligibility from these packets.
Do not assume a device owner or observer has authority to publish place-based knowledge.
Do not reuse a withdrawn, corrected, or not-for-computation packet without review.
